SEARCH
Package org.javalabs.jpa.query

Class WriteQuery

java.lang.Object
org.javalabs.jpa.query.DatabaseQuery
org.javalabs.jpa.query.WriteQuery
All Implemented Interfaces:
Query
Direct Known Subclasses:
DeleteQuery, InsertQuery, UpdateQuery
public abstract class WriteQuery extends DatabaseQuery
Indicates a database write query.

All kind insert/update/delete queries belong to this category. This abstract class defines the common methods of all kind of writable queries.

Author:
Sudiptasish Chanda

    • execute

      public Object execute() throws SQLException
      Description copied from interface: Query
      Execute a database query and return the result. Here it is expected that the query to be build by the underlying framework and made it available to this API.
      Returns:
      Object Result set object.
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • execute

      public Object execute(String query) throws SQLException
      Description copied from interface: Query
      Execute a database query and return the result. This API accepts the raw sql query and executes it against the DB.
      Parameters:
      query - SQL query to be executed.
      Returns:
      Object Result set object.
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • statemnt

      protected PreparedStatement statemnt(Connection conn, String query) throws SQLException
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • retrieveGeneratedId

      protected void retrieveGeneratedId(PreparedStatement pstmt) throws SQLException
      If the statement is setup to retrieve the generated id values, then this method can be used to extract the id values from the pstmt.
      Parameters:
      pstmt -
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • prepare

      protected abstract List<List<Object>> prepare(PreparedStatement pStmt) throws SQLException
      Prepare the statement. Preparing the statement essentially means, replacing the question mark/ place holders with the bind variables. Different type of queries have their own strategy of replacing the bind variables. This API will iterate through the the entities added so far to extract the column values. After successful replace, this API will return the list containing the bind variables.
      Parameters:
      pStmt - Current prepared statement being executed.
      Returns:
      List
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • log

      private void log(String query, List<List<Object>> params)
      If verbose is on, then dump the database query along with the bind parameters.
      Parameters:
      query - DB query to be executed.
      params - Bind variables.

      Reset the state of this query object.
